failure.error_excerpt: AssertionError: Q-learning target bootstraps through terminal state; expected reward-only target when done=True.

guardrails.canonical_fix: Mask the Bellman bootstrap with (1 - done) so terminal transitions only use the immediate reward.
guardrails.prevention_rule: Whenever a Q-learning target is computed, zero the next-state bootstrap term when done=True.
guardrails.title: Q-learning terminal target bootstraps after done=True
guardrails.verification_steps: Run python EXAMPLES/scenarios/q_learning_buggy.py and confirm terminal targets equal reward.

guardrails.canonical_fix: Apply the done mask inside the n-step recursion so the bootstrap tail is zeroed after the first terminal transition.
guardrails.prevention_rule: Every multi-step target should explicitly stop recursion when a terminal flag appears inside the rollout window.
guardrails.title: N-step return bootstraps beyond terminal transition
guardrails.verification_steps: Run python EXAMPLES/scenarios/n_step_return_buggy.py and confirm the terminal step removes the bootstrap tail.

guardrails.canonical_fix: Multiply both next-value and recursive advantage terms by the terminal mask before propagating GAE.
guardrails.prevention_rule: Check GAE with terminal transitions explicitly and verify no next-state value leaks across episode boundaries.
guardrails.title: GAE recursion ignores terminal mask
guardrails.verification_steps: Run python EXAMPLES/scenarios/gae_terminal_mask_buggy.py and confirm terminal transitions cut off the recursion.

issue_get.title: Q-learning terminal target bootstraps after done=True

top_match.canonical_fix: Mask the Bellman bootstrap with (1 - done) so terminal transitions only use the immediate reward.

failure.error_excerpt: AssertionError: DQN target uses online-network bootstrap value instead of detached target-network value.

guardrails.canonical_fix: Select the greedy action with the online network if desired, but evaluate the bootstrap value with the detached target-network outputs.
guardrails.prevention_rule: Keep online-network action selection and target-network bootstrap evaluation separated in DQN-style updates.
guardrails.title: DQN TD target leaks online-network values instead of detached target-network values
guardrails.verification_steps: Run python EXAMPLES/scenarios/dqn_target_network_buggy.py and confirm the TD target uses target-network values.

guardrails.canonical_fix: Mask the Bellman bootstrap with (1 - done) so terminal transitions only use the immediate reward.
guardrails.prevention_rule: Whenever a Q-learning target is computed, zero the next-state bootstrap term when done=True.
guardrails.title: Q-learning terminal target bootstraps after done=True
guardrails.verification_steps: Run python EXAMPLES/scenarios/q_learning_buggy.py and confirm terminal targets equal reward.

guardrails.canonical_fix: Compute policy loss from advantages (returns - critic values) instead of raw returns.
guardrails.prevention_rule: Keep actor and critic objectives separated: actor uses advantages, critic uses value targets.
guardrails.title: Actor-critic policy update uses returns instead of advantages
guardrails.verification_steps: Run python EXAMPLES/scenarios/actor_critic_buggy.py and confirm policy loss uses advantages.

failure.error_excerpt: AssertionError: PPO clipped objective uses max instead of min for positive advantages.

guardrails.canonical_fix: For positive advantages, compute the PPO surrogate with the minimum of unclipped and clipped terms so the trust-region style clip is respected.
guardrails.prevention_rule: Unit-test PPO clipped objective branches separately for positive and negative advantages.
guardrails.title: PPO clipped surrogate uses max instead of min
guardrails.verification_steps: Run python EXAMPLES/scenarios/ppo_clip_objective_buggy.py and confirm the clipped branch caps the objective.

guardrails.canonical_fix: Multiply both next-value and recursive advantage terms by the terminal mask before propagating GAE.
guardrails.prevention_rule: Check GAE with terminal transitions explicitly and verify no next-state value leaks across episode boundaries.
guardrails.title: GAE recursion ignores terminal mask
guardrails.verification_steps: Run python EXAMPLES/scenarios/gae_terminal_mask_buggy.py and confirm terminal transitions cut off the recursion.

guardrails.canonical_fix: Multiply the off-policy actor correction term by the clipped importance weights before applying the update.
guardrails.prevention_rule: Unit-test off-policy actor corrections with rho values below 1 so clipped-importance behavior is exercised.
guardrails.title: Off-policy correction omits clipped importance weights
guardrails.verification_steps: Run python EXAMPLES/scenarios/vtrace_importance_weights_buggy.py and confirm the actor term scales with clipped importance weights.

failure.error_excerpt: AssertionError: Actor-critic policy loss is using returns instead of advantages; subtract critic values before policy update.

guardrails.canonical_fix: Compute policy loss from advantages (returns - critic values) instead of raw returns.
guardrails.prevention_rule: Keep actor and critic objectives separated: actor uses advantages, critic uses value targets.
guardrails.title: Actor-critic policy update uses returns instead of advantages
guardrails.verification_steps: Run python EXAMPLES/scenarios/actor_critic_buggy.py and confirm policy loss uses advantages.

guardrails.canonical_fix: Gate the TD3 actor update with the configured policy_delay so the actor is updated only on delayed critic steps.
guardrails.prevention_rule: Cover TD3 update scheduling with a simple step-index unit test before training runs.
guardrails.title: TD3 actor update ignores delayed policy schedule
guardrails.verification_steps: Run python EXAMPLES/scenarios/td3_policy_delay_buggy.py and confirm odd critic steps skip the actor update when policy_delay=2.

guardrails.canonical_fix: After adding TD3 smoothing noise, clip the target action back to the environment action bounds before computing critic targets.
guardrails.prevention_rule: Always test TD3 target actions at the edge of the action range with positive and negative smoothing noise.
guardrails.title: TD3 target policy smoothing misses action clipping
guardrails.verification_steps: Run python EXAMPLES/scenarios/td3_target_smoothing_buggy.py and confirm the target action is clipped to bounds.

failure.error_excerpt: AssertionError: SAC temperature update uses the wrong sign; expected target_entropy - observed_entropy.

guardrails.canonical_fix: Form the SAC temperature residual as target_entropy - observed_entropy so the alpha update moves in the correct exploration-restoring direction.
guardrails.prevention_rule: Unit-test SAC alpha residual signs with both entropy-above-target and entropy-below-target cases.
guardrails.title: SAC temperature update uses the wrong entropy residual sign
guardrails.verification_steps: Run python EXAMPLES/scenarios/sac_alpha_sign_buggy.py and confirm the residual matches target_entropy - observed_entropy.

failure.error_excerpt: AssertionError: Off-policy correction omits clipped importance weights in the actor update.
